name: @careline/emr-sim
description: Lightweight OpenMRS/Bahmni-compatible FHIR R4 EMR simulator, used to demo the CareLine Vitals Bridge without a full OpenMRS install. Exposes the same /ws/fhir2/R4 REST surface so the FHIR adapter requires zero changes to point at a real OpenMRS/Bahmni instance later.
